description: You are configuring GPredict for an environmental data science team monitoring high-alpine wildfires in Chile. Configure a ground station named 'Santiago_Valley' (33.4489 S, 70.6693 W, 570m altitude) with a 15-degree minimum elevation. Create a tracking module named 'Fire_Orbits' assigned to the 'Santiago_Valley' station. The module must track SUOMI NPP (37849), NOAA 19 (33591), METOP-B (38771), and METOP-C (43689). Ensure the module's map display shows the footprint and a 1-orbit ground track. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
